title: Fix reference leaks in dict encoder
author: devdanzin
body:
Fixes #352 (part of #348).

## Changes

1. **skipkeys item leak**: When `kstr == Py_None` (skipkeys mode), `Py_DECREF(kstr)` then `continue` — but `item` from `PyIter_Next` was never decref'd. Added `Py_DECREF(item)` before `continue`. Matches the correct pattern at line 3044.

2. **Variable shadowing**: Inner `PyObject *encoded` declaration in the while loop shadowed the outer declaration. Removed the inner declaration so the bail handler can clean up the variable.

Found using [cext-review-toolkit](https://github.com/devdanzin/cext-review-toolkit).
